executable.script:
#!/bin/bash
source /home/gopika/js7-python-env-311/bin/activate
release=$(curl -s -k -L 'https://github.com/sos-berlin/js7-client-python/releases/latest' | grep py3-none-any.whl | head -1 | sed -E -n 's/.*js7_client_python-(.*)-py3-none-any.whl.*/\1/p')
curl -s -k -L "https://github.com/sos-berlin/js7-client-python/releases/download/v${release}/js7_client_python-${release}-py3-none-any.whl" -o /tmp/js7_client_python-${release}-py3-none-any.whl
pip install /tmp/js7_client_python-${release}-py3-none-any.whl
pip install requests

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude 
def test_controller_instance(client, controller_type, controller_url):
    ok = client.controller.manage.test_controller_instance(
        url=controller_url
    )
    print(f"{controller_type} connectivity:", ok)
    return ok

ok_primary = test_controller_instance(
    client,
    controller_type=os.environ.get("CONTROLLER_TYPE", "STANDALONE"),
    controller_url=os.environ.get("STANDALONE_CONTROLLER_URL")
)

return_values_file = os.environ.get("JS7_RETURN_VALUES")
if return_values_file:
    with open(return_values_file, "w") as f:
        f.write(f"response_primary={str(ok_primary).lower()}\n")  
else:
    print("JS7_RETURN_VALUES not set - not running in JS7 context")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude 
def register_controller(client, url):
    ok = client.controller.manage.register_controller(
        controllers=[
            js7.model.Controller(
                url=url,
                role="STANDALONE",
                title="STANDALONE"
            )
        ]
    )
    return ok

# Capture the returned value in global scope
ok = register_controller(
    client,
    url=os.environ.get("STANDALONE_CONTROLLER_URL")
)

print("Controller registered:", ok)
print("Done.")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude 
def register_agent(client, controller_id, agent_url, agent_id, agent_name, agent_alias):
    controller_id = os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID")
    agent_url= os.environ.get("AGENT_URL")
    agent_id= os.environ.get("AGENT_ID")
    agent_name= os.environ.get("AGENT_NAME")
    agent_alias= os.environ.get("AGENT_ALIAS")

    ok = client.agent.manage.store_standalone_agents(
        controller_id=controller_id,
        agents=[
            js7.model.StoreAgent(
                url=agent_url,
                id=agent_id,
                name=agent_name,
                aliases=[agent_alias]
            )
        ]
    )
    print("Agent stored:", ok)

    ok = client.agent.deploy.standalone_agents(
        controller_id=controller_id,
        agent_ids=[agent_id]
    )
    print("Agent deployed:", ok)
    return ok

register_agent(
    client,
    controller_id=os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID"),
    agent_url=os.environ.get("AGENT_URL"),
    agent_id=os.environ.get("AGENT_ID"),       
    agent_name=os.environ.get("AGENT_NAME"),
    agent_alias=os.environ.get("AGENT_ALIAS")
)

print("Done.")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
import json
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude  
def get_agents_status(client, controller_id, agent_ids):

    ok = client.agent.manage.get_agents_status_info(
        controller_id=controller_id,
        agent_ids=agent_ids          # expects a list
    )
    json_result = json.dumps(ok, indent=4, default=str)
    print("Agent status info:", json_result)
    return ok

# Read env vars OUTSIDE the function, in the global scope
controller_id = os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID", "controller")
agent_ids_env  = os.environ.get("AGENT_ID", "")
agent_ids      = [aid.strip() for aid in agent_ids_env.split(",") if aid.strip()]

get_agents_status(
    client,
    controller_id=controller_id,
    agent_ids=agent_ids
)
print("Done.")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude 
order_ids = client.order.operate.add_orders(
    controller_id=os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID"),
    orders=[
        js7.model.Order(
            order_name=os.environ.get("ORDER_NAME"),
            workflow_path=os.environ.get("WORKFLOW_PATH")
        )
    ]
)
print("Created Order IDs:", order_ids)
return_values_file = os.environ.get("JS7_RETURN_VALUES")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude  
workflow_path  = os.environ.get("WORKFLOW_PATH")
object_type    = os.environ.get("OBJECT_TYPE")
controller_id  = os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID")

deploy_configs = [
    js7.model.DeployConfiguration(
        path=workflow_path,
        object_type=object_type
    )
]

ok = client.inventory.manage.revoke_configurations_action(
    controller_ids=[controller_id],
    configurations=deploy_configs
)

print("Workflow revoke status:", ok)

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude  
workflow_path = os.environ.get("WORKFLOW_PATH")
object_type   = os.environ.get("OBJECT_TYPE")
object_type_enum = js7.model.DeployObjectType[object_type]

configs = [
    js7.model.Configuration(
        path=workflow_path,
        object_type=object_type_enum
    )
]

client.inventory.manage.remove_configuration(
    configurations=configs
)

print(f"Successfully removed configuration: {workflow_path} ({object_type})")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude  
def revoke_agent(client, controller_id, agent_id):

    ok = client.agent.manage.revoke_standalone_agents(
        controller_id=controller_id,
        agent_ids=[agent_id]
    )
    print("Agent revoked:", ok)

    return ok
revoke_agent(
    client,
    controller_id=os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID"),
    agent_id=os.environ.get("AGENT_ID")
)

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude 
def remove_agent(client, controller_id, agent_id, force=True):

    ok = client.agent.manage.remove_agent(
        controller_id=controller_id,
        agent_id=agent_id,
        force=force
    )
    print("Agent removed:", ok)

    return ok
remove_agent(
    client,
    controller_id=os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID"),
    agent_id=os.environ.get("AGENT_ID"),
    force=os.environ.get("FORCE").lower() == "true"
)

print("Done.")

#!/opt/python3/venv/bin/python3
import js7
import os
##!include agent_register_scriptinclude 

controller_id = os.environ.get("JS7_CONTROLLER_ID")

ok = client.controller.manage.unregister_controller(controller_id=controller_id)
print(ok)
